summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Maestro EGP new features. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (21/21 tests). Frontend features all working correctly including: Dashboard quick actions (Reports & Expenses), Settings 8 tabs, User management with edit/delete/permissions, Categories/Products CRUD, Reports page with 7 tabs and date filters.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login authentication (200 OK)
Backend: Invalid login rejection (401)
Backend: Get users list
Backend: Create, update, delete user with permissions
Backend: Get categories
Backend: Create, update, delete category
Backend: Get products
Backend: Create product with cost/profit calculation (profit = price - cost - operating_cost)
Backend: Update product with recalculated profit
Backend: Delete product
Backend: Sales report endpoint
Backend: Purchases report endpoint
Backend: Inventory report endpoint
Backend: Expenses report endpoint
Backend: Profit/Loss report endpoint
Backend: Products report endpoint
Backend: Delivery credits report endpoint
Backend: Get branches
Backend: Get delivery apps (toters, talabat, baly, alsaree3, talabati)
Backend: Get printers
Backend: Get settings
Backend: Get expense categories
Backend: Create expense
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 8 quick action buttons
Frontend: Quick action - التقارير (Reports) button present
Frontend: Quick action - المصاريف (Expenses) button present
Frontend: Settings page loads with 8 tabs
Frontend: Settings tabs - المظهر، المستخدمين، الفروع، الفئات، المنتجات، الطابعات، شركات التوصيل، الإشعارات
Frontend: Users tab shows user list with edit/delete buttons
Frontend: Edit user dialog with name, role, branch, permissions, active status
Frontend: 11 permission options available (pos, orders, tables, inventory, reports, expenses, delivery, products, categories, users, settings)
Frontend: Categories tab shows categories with product count
Frontend: Categories have delete buttons
Frontend: Products tab shows products with price and profit
Frontend: Products have edit and delete buttons
Frontend: Add product dialog with all fields (name, category, price, cost, operating_cost, image, description)
Frontend: Reports page loads with 7 tabs
Frontend: Reports tabs - المبيعات، المشتريات، المخزون، المصاريف، الأرباح، الأصناف، شركات التوصيل
Frontend: Reports have date filters and branch selector
Frontend: Sales report shows total sales, costs, profit, orders, payment methods, order types, top products
Frontend: Expenses page accessible with add expense button
seed_data_creation: Test expense created during API testing (50,000 IQD for supplies category)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Dashboard has 8 quick actions including Reports and Expenses. 2) Settings page has 8 tabs with full CRUD for users, categories, products. 3) User edit dialog includes permissions management. 4) Products show profit calculation (price - cost - operating_cost). 5) Reports page has 7 tabs with date filters and branch selector. 6) Expenses page is functional. Previous iteration issues with POS Kitchen/Payment buttons may still exist but were not in scope for this test.
